channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Privatisation Commission Approves Fauji Fertiliser's Role in PIA Consortium
item.description: The Privatisation Commission of Pakistan has approved Fauji Fertiliser Company’s (FFC) inclusion in the consortium led by Arif Habib, which had won the bid for a 75% stake in Pakistan International Ai...

item.title: How to Make Your Rice Healthier with Multigrain Mix
item.description: If you sabi love rice well-well but wan make am more nutritious, dis multigrain rice mix go fit you. Instead of eating just white rice, you fit mix am with quinoa and lentils. Dis combination dey give...

item.title: Reeves delivers low-key spring statement amid economic pressures and political sparring
item.description: Rachel Reeves delivered a notably brief and fiscally uneventful spring statement, insisting that the government’s economic plan remained sound despite worsening indicators. Official figures showing fa...

item.title: Gavin Newsom Shares Unusual Conversation With Donald Trump Before National Guard Deployment
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom recounted his experiences speaking with former President Donald Trump during an appearance on Jimmy Kimmel’s late-night show, highlighting a particularly unusual phone...

item.title: Retired police officer and companion killed in Maguindanao del Sur ambush
item.description: COTABATO CITY — Elias Dandan, a retired Philippine National Police major known for his extensive work in peacebuilding and promoting religious and cultural solidarity between Muslim and Christian comm...

item.title: Edmonton Oilers Come Back to Beat Ottawa Senators in Overtime
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers pulled off an impressive late-game comeback to defeat the Ottawa Senators 5-4 in overtime on March 3, 2026. After trailing by two goals for most of the first 40 minutes, Leon Drais...

item.title: Africa’s Rising Obesity Crisis and What Needs to Be Done
item.description: Obesity has become a growing problem across Africa, with the World Health Organization (WHO) recognizing it as a disease. The trend has worsened in recent years, with urbanisation and economic changes...

item.title: Melania Trump Leads UN Meeting on Child Protection Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: US First Lady Melania Trump chaired a United Nations Security Council meeting on Monday focusing on children and education during conflicts. This was historic as no spouse of a serving world leader ha...

item.title: Attorney-General Takes Over Prosecution of Former AGF Malami and Son Over Terrorism Charges
item.description: For Abuja, the Attorney General of the Federation (AGF) and Minister of Justice, Lateef Fagbemi, SAN don take over the prosecution of former AGF Abubakar Malami, SAN and him son Abdulaziz. Dem dey fac...

item.title: Apple introduces iPhone 17e with higher base storage starting at $599
item.description: Apple has officially unveiled the iPhone 17e, its more affordable smartphone model, starting at $599 with 256GB of storage. The launch reflects Apple's strategy to maintain market share amid rising me...

item.title: Trump says it’s too late for Iran to negotiate amid escalating tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump recently stated that it is 'too late' for Iran to seek negotiations, following the heightened tensions in West Asia after its joint attack with Israel on Tehran. In a social ...

item.title: Researchers Study Encounters with Nonhuman Entities During DMT Experiences
item.description: A new research initiative is exploring the experiences of people who encounter nonhuman entities while under the influence of DMT, a powerful psychedelic. The project, called Eleusis, is launching a r...

item.title: Man Injured After Grenade Explodes Outside New Fast Food Branch in Lamitan City
item.description: A grenade exploded outside a newly constructed fast food outlet in Barangay Malakas, Lamitan City, Basilan, on the evening of March 3, 2026, injuring a bystander and alarming nearby residents. Two men...

item.title: Bitget expands tokenised stock and traditional market access through upgraded universal exchange platform
item.description: Bitget has announced the global rollout of an upgraded version of its mobile app, integrating cryptocurrency and traditional financial (TradFi) markets within a single interface. The update follows th...

item.title: Zanzibar House of Representatives Trains Journalists on Parliamentary Procedures and Reporting
item.description: Journalists covering the Zanzibar House of Representatives gathered at the conference hall in Chukwani on February 14, 2026, for a one-day intensive seminar aimed at strengthening their understanding ...

item.title: Russia Offers to Mediate Pakistan-India, Pakistan-Afghanistan Disputes Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Russia’s ambassador to Pakistan, Albert Khorev, has extended an offer to mediate in Pakistan’s ongoing conflicts with India and Afghanistan. The tensions between Islamabad and New Delhi have escalated...

item.title: Victorian Poll Shows Labor and Liberal Support Falling, One Nation Rising
item.description: Recent polling in Victoria indicates a sharp decline in support for both the Labor Party and the Liberal-National Coalition ahead of the state's November election. According to the latest survey condu...

item.title: Deputy PM Dar begins Pakistan-EU strategic dialogue in Brussels
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar arrived in Brussels on Wednesday to co-chair the 7th session of the Pakistan-EU Strategic Dialogue, following his visit to Russia for the Shanghai ...

item.title: UK to Deploy HMS Dragon and Anti-Drone Helicopters to Cyprus Following Drone Attack
item.description: Britain has confirmed it will deploy the Type 45 air defence destroyer HMS Dragon and helicopters equipped with counter-drone capabilities to Cyprus, in response to a recent drone strike on RAF Akroti...

item.title: Siaya doctors withdraw services demanding action over alleged assault at Bondo hospital
item.description: Health services in Siaya County were disrupted after doctors downed their tools to protest an alleged assault on a colleague at Bondo Sub-County Hospital. The Kenya Medical Practitioners, Pharmacists ...
